Then we use AI tools to get different explanation and examples. Finally, students rewrite the content in their own words and share it own medium. This way we repeat the cycle. Same read, see and do. Better memory, visual and story based learning take longer in the brain community, medium posts and common creator learning networks. And what is my vision? I believe I believe in a future with fully AI supported education. AI doesn't only make access to knowledge easier, it also inspired creativity. I'm working on a project that connects medicine, engineering, and social science with ai. My goal is for students to learn technical skills, ethical thinking, and social awareness.
